name: The Spruce
notes: Major Dotdash Meredith publication. Multi-million monthly traffic. Has contributor program — pitch via About Us page. Very high DA (90+). Competitive but extremely valuable backlink.

name: Design Milk
notes: DA 71, DR 81. 24K-70K monthly traffic. Has contributor guidelines page. Focus on modern design, architecture, art, tech.

name: Remodelaholic
notes: Popular DIY/renovation blog. ~100K+ monthly traffic. Has guest post submission page. Focus on DIY tutorials, before/after projects, renovation tips.

name: House Digest
notes: DA 58, DR 74. ~70K monthly traffic. Static Media publication. Contact via their page to pitch articles.

name: Re-Thinking The Future
notes: DA 52-54, DR 73-75. 98K monthly traffic. Has Write for Us page. Architecture and construction focus. Good for handyman/renovation content.

name: Urban Splatter
notes: DA 46-49, DR 58-64. 94K-214K monthly traffic. Has Write for Us page. Covers architecture, construction, real estate, lifestyle.

name: Gardening Know How
notes: DA 74. 16.4M monthly traffic! Huge gardening resource. Check About Us for contributor info. Great for outdoor/landscaping content.

name: The Constructor
notes: DA 48. 134K monthly traffic. Has Write for Us page. Civil engineering and construction focus. Great for technical handyman/contractor content.

name: Safeopedia
notes: DA 45. 117K monthly traffic. Has Write for Us page. Safety-focused — good for home safety, construction safety articles.

name: Fine Homes and Living
notes: DA 42-52, DR 63-65. Luxury home and interior design focus. Has Write for Us page.

name: Decorator Advice
notes: DA 52, DR 63-74. 4.6K-9.5K monthly traffic. Interior design and lifestyle focus.

name: Futurist Architecture
notes: DR 65. 26.3K monthly traffic. Architecture and design blog.

name: Homify
notes: DA 46, DR 71. Global platform for architecture and interiors. Very high authority.

name: The Architects Diary
notes: DA 41, DR 67. ~20K monthly traffic. Architecture and home improvement focus.

name: Pretty Handy Girl
category: DIY, Women in Construction, Home Improvement
notes: Popular DIY blog focused on women doing home improvement. Great audience match for handyman services.

name: Architecture Lab
notes: Architecture and home design blog. Has Write for Us page.

name: Decoist
notes: Interior design blog with Write for Us page. Good for home decor and design content.

name: e-Architect
notes: Global architecture news site. Accepts submissions about architecture, design, and construction.

name: Kitchen and Bath Resources
notes: 800-1500 words, up to 2 backlinks, original unpublished content. Topics: kitchen/bath design, renovation tips, product reviews, DIY, eco-design.

name: The Flooring Blog
notes: Min 800 words, H3 headings required, no affiliate links. Specialized flooring blog with real articles.

name: Floor N Home
notes: Min 500 words, dofollow links. Accepts renovation, decor, DIY, landscaping content.

name: Arizona's Finest Roofing
notes: Min 700 words, 1 author link, images min 400x400. Topics: roofing materials, maintenance, trends. No AI content.

name: McElroy Metal
notes: Major metal roofing manufacturer. Accepts expert content about roofing systems and sustainable construction.

name: Home Tech Scoop
notes: 500-1500 words, no affiliate links. Topics: home automation, security systems, smart devices.

name: Security Forward
notes: 1000-1500 words, images/video welcome. Accepts tutorials, guides, product reviews on security.

name: Home Automation Talks
notes: Min 1000 words, 1-2 backlinks. 16 categories: automation, security, voice tech, smart thermostats, IoT.

name: WonBolt
notes: 800-1500 words, 2 dofollow links in bio. Topics: smart devices, automation, AI, blockchain, industrial IoT.

name: IoTDunia
notes: 1000-2000 words optimal, 1 contextual link, 5-10 business days publishing time. Topics: Arduino, Raspberry Pi, smart home.

name: Online Tool Reviews
notes: Min 1500 words, 1 image per 250 words, max 1 hyperlink. Accepts how-to, tool reviews with pros/cons, woodworking.

name: Toolrage
notes: Min 1000 words, unique content only. Focus on auto and mechanical tools, power tools.

name: Best Tool Review
notes: Welcomes experts on tools, woodworking, DIY. Oriented toward home masters and professionals.

name: Sabrina's Organizing
notes: 1500-3000 words, exclusive content only, nofollow links. Promotion via social media and newsletter. Themed days: Sunday (organizing), Friday (DIY).

name: Shine Your Light Blog
notes: 800-3000 words, 2-3 images with rights, 2-3 self-links + 2 topical links. Content becomes site property after publishing.

name: The Global Hues
notes: 900-1500 words, 1 contextual link, Google Doc or Word only. Review time 3-7 days. Covers kitchen, bathroom, budgeting, materials.

name: Home Improvement Help Center
notes: Min 550 words, 1 JPEG image, author bio. Accepts kitchen, bathroom, decor, safety topics.

name: Finderify
notes: Manual review, response within 5 business days. Priority for geo-targeted content (city, region). Focus on hidden renovation costs, homeowner tips.

name: Lovely Home Accents
notes: Min 500 words, 100% unique, images 1000x665 px, author bio 150-250 words. Accepts DIY, landscaping, plumbing.

name: Estimate Florida Consulting
notes: Min 1200 words, headings and lists required, 1 dofollow + 2 internal links. Specializes in renovation cost estimation.

name: House Whirl
notes: Min 1000 words, up to 2 dofollow links, author bio 50-100 words, response 3-5 business days.

name: Beautiful House Tips
notes: Accepts interior design tips, DIY repairs, painting, sustainable materials. Oriented toward practical homeowner advice.

name: Kooihaus Magazine
notes: Min 700 words, original well-written content. Niche magazine on home decor and interior.

name: DALTX Real Estate
notes: 500-1200 words, no AI content, max 3 dofollow links, bio ~250 words, response within 3 days. Dallas TX focus — good regional match.

name: Propaura
notes: Min 600 words (2000+ for featured), .doc format, response up to 24 hours. Accepts staging, real estate, home decor.

name: All Around Moving
notes: Claims 1.5M+ monthly visitors. Accepts moving, real estate tips, decor, featured blogger. Great for handyman + moving combo content.

name: KS Realty Agent
category: Real Estate, Home Improvement, Home Warranty
notes: Accepts homeownership content including warranty and insurance tips. Oriented toward home buyers and owners.

name: Green and Prosperous
notes: 1000-2000 words, no AI content, up to 2 body links + 1 bio link. Paid tiers: Community $25, Editorial $95, Sponsored $150+. Topics: eco renovation, clean energy, off-grid living.

name: Tiny Life House
notes: 700-1400 words, max 2 non-commercial links, response within 20 hours. Topics: design, DIY, zoning, financing, minimalism, off-grid.

name: HeartWork Organizing
notes: 300-550 words, original photos only (no stock), author bio max 100 words. Site retains rights to published version.

name: Tornado Dave
notes: Min 300 words, 3 dofollow links, 1 stock image. Multi-niche platform — low entry barrier.

name: Home Zines
notes: Home improvement and DIY blog with submit page. Good for general home improvement content.

name: Roofing Cost Calculator
notes: Min 1000 words, 1 dofollow link in author bio, no AI content, H2/H3 structure. Topics: residential/commercial roofing, repairs, materials.

name: HP Roofing
notes: Min 1000 words, max 1 hyperlink, images with usage rights. Focus: roofing techniques, materials, trends.

name: Mothers Always Right
notes: DA 44. 66.2K monthly traffic. Has Write for Us page. Family and DIY focus — great for family-friendly handyman content.

name: Build Review
notes: DA 37, DR 73-74. Construction and architecture focus.

name: Old House to New Home
notes: Blog focused on old home restoration and renovation. Perfect niche match for handyman services.

name: Love Chic Living
notes: UK interior design blog with Write for Us page. Lifestyle and home decor focus.

name: Real Homes
notes: Major UK/US home renovation publication (Future PLC). Very high DA. Contact editorial team via About Us page for contributor opportunities.

name: Homes & Gardens
notes: Major publication (Future PLC). Very high DA. Accepts expert contributor content — contact editorial team.

name: Apartment Therapy
notes: Major lifestyle publication. DA 80+. Has freelance contributor opportunities — check contact page. Very competitive but high-value backlink.

name: Bob Vila
notes: Iconic home improvement brand. DA 80+. Has freelance contributor program. Pitch via contact page. Extremely high authority.

name: Family Handyman
notes: TMB publication. DA 80+. The #1 handyman brand. Accepts expert contributor pitches. Perfect niche match for FixCraft.

name: Today's Homeowner
notes: Danny Lipford's brand. High DA. Has editorial contributor opportunities. Great authority in home improvement space.

name: This Old House
notes: Iconic home renovation brand. DA 85+. Has expert contributor program. Extremely competitive but dream-tier backlink.

name: Charlotte Agenda / Axios Charlotte
notes: Local Charlotte publication (formerly Charlotte Agenda). Accepts local business stories and expert commentary. Perfect for Charlotte handyman visibility.

name: Charlotte Magazine
notes: Charlotte's premier lifestyle magazine. Accepts contributor pitches for local business and lifestyle content. High local authority.
